_comment: Regression: selecting BYOD AAP preset #9 (Big Muff) must propagate the EXPECTED parameter VALUES in uapmd (not just count/survival). The realtime process() output path carries these values; suspending it for a metadata rescan silently dropped them. Oracle values were captured from aaphostsample built from current aap-core (see tests/cases/byod-preset-output.json for the rendered-output sibling check). Local .work/local overrides are expected for validating in-flight aap-core/uapmd/aap-juce changes.
name: uapmd-byod-preset-values
